items.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.summary: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

items.title: Teen suspects fatally shoot three in suspected hate crime at San Diego mosque
items.summary: The alleged attackers were aged 17 and 18 and one left a note containing "generalised hate rhetoric", investigators say.

items.title: At least 118 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, official says
items.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the outbreak an international emergency.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 「熊熊」入侵東京？ 八王子市監視器發現兩頭亞洲黑熊 市府急設捕獸籠
items.summary: 日本東京八王子市於17日發現2頭亞洲黑熊出沒，市政府目前已設置捕獸籠，並呼籲當地居民提高警覺。  《FNN》報導，17日晚間6點半左右，八王子市上恩方町出現了疑似為母子的兩頭...…

items.title: 川普稱軍售是「籌碼」 《衛報》：北京正藉此放大台灣內部疑慮與分歧
items.summary: 美國總統川普日前在北京會晤習近平後，針對台灣發出的一連串表態正引發國際戰略界高度警覺。英國《衛報》分析指出，川普將對台軍售形容為「談判籌碼」並質疑美軍遠征效益，相關言論已成為北...…
